reasoning: The control SI-4(12) focuses on automated alerts for changes in network configurations. In Kubernetes, similar monitoring can be achieved by setting up audit logs and alerts for changes to NetworkPolicies, Ingress/Egress rules, and Service configurations. Additionally, changes to critical RBAC configurations like ClusterRoles can also be monitored. These checks ensure that any unauthorized or unexpected changes trigger alerts, maintaining security compliance.
